name: Seira Table Lamp - 20 Inch Height - TBL4499 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the bold elegance of the Seira table lamp. Standing at 20 inches, this lamp offers a striking design with its black resin and iron base that adds a touch of modern sophistication to any room. The cotton shade softly diffuses light, creating a warm and inviting ambiance. Whether for your living room, bedroom, or office, the Seira lamp effortlessly complements a variety of decor styles. Its sleek, artful design makes it more than just a light source; it is a statement piece that enhances your home with grace and charm. Embrace the beauty and functionality of the Seira black resin table lamp and transform your environment into a haven of style and comfort.
